response.justification: Strong senior IC with 15+ years of broad full-stack experience and demonstrated initiative (founder, workshops, OSS), but the role requires a Software Engineering Manager focused on engineering productivity, developer tools, and build/test infrastructure for a mobile ecosystem. The resume shows no formal people-management experience, no explicit tech-lead role with direct reports, and only tangential developer-tooling work (MCP generators, CI setup, custom test runner). Mobile-platform depth is limited to one iOS/tvOS stint a decade ago. Misaligned with the management seniority and dev-tools/mobile focus.
strengths: Deep, varied engineering background (web, mobile, desktop, embedded) over 15+ years
Tangible developer-tooling artifacts: D test runner (Trial), Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup, MCP tooling
Strong teaching/community signal: workshops, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, conference talk
concerns: No evidence of people management or formal team leadership with direct reports
Mobile-platform exposure is thin and dated (single iOS/Apple TV stint ~2015)
No demonstrated experience setting team roadmaps, performance expectations, or org-level change
